name: A - Apple
funFact: A is the first letter and makes the 'ah' sound!

name: B - Ball
funFact: B makes a 'buh' sound like in ball and bear!

name: C - Cat
funFact: C can sound like 'k' in cat or 's' in city!

name: D - Dog
funFact: D makes a 'duh' sound like in dog and dance!

name: E - Elephant
funFact: E is the most common letter in English!

name: F - Fish
funFact: F makes a 'fff' sound by blowing air!

name: G - Grapes
funFact: G can be hard like in 'go' or soft like in 'giraffe'!

name: H - Hat
funFact: H makes a breathy 'huh' sound!

name: I - Ice Cream
funFact: I can say its name like in 'ice' or say 'ih' like in 'igloo'!

name: J - Jellyfish
funFact: J makes a 'juh' sound like in jump and joy!

name: K - Kite
funFact: K makes the same sound as hard C!

name: L - Lion
funFact: L makes a smooth 'lll' sound with your tongue!

name: M - Moon
funFact: M makes a humming 'mmm' sound!

name: N - Nest
funFact: N makes a 'nnn' sound through your nose!

name: O - Orange
funFact: O is shaped like a circle and can say its name!

name: P - Penguin
funFact: P makes a popping 'puh' sound!

name: Q - Queen
funFact: Q almost always has U right after it!

name: R - Rainbow
funFact: R makes a 'rrr' sound at the back of your mouth!

name: S - Star
funFact: S makes a hissing 'sss' sound like a snake!

name: T - Tree
funFact: T makes a 'tuh' sound with the tip of your tongue!

name: U - Umbrella
funFact: U can say 'uh' like in umbrella or its name like in 'unicorn'!

name: V - Violin
funFact: V makes a buzzing 'vvv' sound!

name: W - Watermelon
funFact: W is called 'double-u' because it looks like two U's!

name: X - Xylophone
funFact: X usually makes a 'ks' sound like in 'fox'!

name: Y - Yacht
funFact: Y can be a consonant or a vowel!

name: Z - Zebra
funFact: Z is the last letter and makes a 'zzz' sound!
